name: matter_c
description: Minimal pure-C Matter device library. Firmware-agnostic core; all host couplings (persistence, time, RNG, UDP, BLE, mDNS) are injected through a port/HAL struct so it can be reused by any firmware. Inspired by the device-subset architecture of Tasmota Berry Matter (S. Hadinger); crypto via BearSSL (T. Pornin, BSD).
